title: lophacme incompleta
intro: Lophacme incompleta, also known as the incomplete lophacme, is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lophacme incompleta include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, Lophacme incompleta is often used in the form of a tea or tincture, or applied topically in the form of a cream or ointment.
